segments.text: JANE: Hello, Jane Fairbanks speaking.
segments.translation: 简：你好，我是简·费尔班克斯。

segments.text: FRANK: Oh, good morning. My name's Frank Pritchard. I've just retired and moved to Southoe.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：哦，早上好。我叫弗兰克·普里查德。我刚刚退休，搬到了索索。

segments.text: I'd like to become a volunteer, and I gather you co-ordinate voluntary work in the village.
segments.translation: 我想成为一名志愿者，我了解到你们负责协调村里的志愿工作。

segments.text: JANE: That's right.
segments.translation: 简：没错。

segments.text: FRANK: What sort of thing could I do?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：我能做什么？

segments.text: JANE: Well, we need help with the village library.
segments.translation: 简：嗯，我们需要人来协助村庄中的图书馆。

segments.text: We borrow books from the town library, and individuals also donate them.
segments.translation: 我们从镇图书馆借书，也接受个人捐赠。

segments.text: So, one thing you could do is get involved in collecting them - if you've got a car, that is.
segments.translation: 所以，你可以做的一件事就是参与收书，如果你有车的话。

segments.text: FRANK: Yes, that's no problem.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：是的，我有。没问题。

segments.text: JANE: The times are pretty flexible so we can arrange it to suit you.
segments.translation: 简：时间很灵活，所以我们可以根据你的情况安排。

segments.text: Another thing is the records that we keep of the books we're given, and those we borrow and need to return to the town library.
segments.translation: 另一件事是我们会记录我们收到的书，借来的书和需要归还给镇上图书馆的书。

segments.text: It would be very useful to have another person to help keep them up to date.
segments.translation: 能有另一个人帮忙更新记录的话就太好了。

segments.text: FRANK: Right. I'm used to working on a computer - I presume they're computerised?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：明白。我习惯于用电脑工作——我猜这些记录是在电脑上操作的吧？

segments.text: JANE: Oh yes.
segments.translation: 简：哦，是的。

segments.text: FRANK: Is the library purpose-built?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：图书馆是专门建的吗？

segments.text: I haven't noticed it when I've walked round the village.
segments.translation: 我在村子里散步的时候都没有注意到它。

segments.text: JANE: No, we simply have the use of a room in the village hall, the West Room.
segments.translation: 简：不，我们只是使用村庄大厅里的一个房间，西边的房间。

segments.text: It's on the left as you go in.
segments.translation: 你进去的时候左手边就是。

segments.text: FRANK: I must go and have a look inside the hall.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：我得去大厅里看看。

segments.text: JANE: Yes, it's a nice building.
segments.translation: 简：是的，那是一栋漂亮的建筑。

segments.text: FRANK: Do you run a lunch club in the village for elderly people?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：你们为村里的老人开设午餐俱乐部吗？

segments.text: I know a lot of places do.
segments.translation: 我知道很多地方都有。

segments.text: JANE: Yes, we have a very successful club.
segments.translation: 简：是的，我们有一个俱乐部，经营得很好。

segments.text: FRANK: I could help with transport, if that's of any use.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：如果用得上的话，我能在运输上帮帮忙。

segments.text: JANE: Ooo definitely. People come to the club from neighbouring villages, and we're always in need of more drivers.
segments.translation: 简：哦，当然。人们会从邻近的村庄来到俱乐部，我们总是需要更多的司机。

segments.text: FRANK: And does the club have groups that focus on a particular hobby, too?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：俱乐部也有针对某一特定爱好的小组吗？

segments.text: I could get involved in one or two, particularly if there are any art groups.
segments.translation: 我可以参加一两个，特别是如果有艺术团体的话。

segments.text: JANE: Excellent. I'll find out where we need help and get back to you.
segments.translation: 简：太好了。我会看看哪里需要帮助，然后再联系你。

segments.text: FRANK: Fine. What about help for individual residents.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：好的。对个别居民的帮助呢？

segments.text: Do you arrange that at all?
segments.translation: 这里有安排吗？

segments.text: JANE: Yes, we do it as a one-off. In fact, there's Mrs Carroll.
segments.translation: 简：是的，我们提供一次性帮助。事实上，卡罗尔夫人需要帮助。

segments.text: She needs a lift to the hospital next week, and we're struggling to find someone.
segments.translation: 她下周需要搭便车去医院，我们正在努力找人。

segments.text: FRANK: When's her appointment?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：她的预约是什么时候？

segments.text: JANE: On Tuesday. It would take the whole morning.
segments.translation: 简：星期二。要花一上午的时间。

segments.text: FRANK: I could do that.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：我可以送她。

segments.text: JANE: Oh, that would be great. Thank you.
segments.translation: 简：哦，那太好了。非常感谢。

segments.text: And also, next week, we're arranging to have some work done to Mr. Selsbury's house before he moves, as he isn't healthy enough to do it himself.
segments.translation: 另外，我们计划下周在塞尔斯伯里先生搬家前整理一下他的房子，他身体不好，自己做不来。

segments.text: We've got some people to decorate his kitchen, but if you could do some weeding in his garden, that would be wonderful.
segments.translation: 我们要找人来装饰他的厨房。但如果你能给他的花园除草，那就太好了。

segments.text: FRANK: OK. I'd enjoy that. And presumably the day and time are flexible.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：好的。我很乐意。我猜日期和时间是灵活的吧。

segments.text: JANE: Oh yes. Just say when would suit you best, and we'll let Mr. Selsbury know.
segments.translation: 简：哦，是的。你只说你什么时间方便，我们再告诉塞尔斯伯里先生。

segments.text: FRANK: Good.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：很好。

segments.text: JANE: The volunteers group also organises monthly social events, which is a great way to meet other people, of course.
segments.translation: 简：志愿者组织还每月组织社交活动，当然了，这也是认识其他人的好方法。

segments.text: FRANK: Uhuh.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：嗯。

segments.text: JANE: So next month, on the 19th of October, we're holding a quiz - a couple of residents are great at planning unusual ones, and we always fill the village hall.
segments.translation: 简：所以下个月10月19日我们将举行一个问答比赛。一些居民非常擅长策划不寻常的问答比赛，到时村里大厅满满当当都是人。

segments.text: FRANK: That sounds like fun.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：听起来很有趣。

segments.text: Can I do anything to help?
segments.translation: 我能帮忙吗？

segments.text: JANE: Well, because of the number of people, we need plenty of refreshments for halfway through.
segments.translation: 简：嗯，因为人多，我们中途需要很多茶点。

segments.text: So, if you could provide any, we'd be grateful.
segments.translation: 因此，如果您能提供任何一些，我们将不胜感激。

segments.text: FRANK: I'm sure I could. I'll think about what to make, and let you know.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：我相信我可以。我要考虑做什么，然后告诉你。

segments.text: JANE: Thank you. Then on November the 18th, we're holding a dance, also in the village hall.
segments.translation: 简：谢谢。之后我们也在村里的大厅举行了一场舞会，在11月18日。

segments.text: We've booked a band that specialises in music of the 1930s - they've been before, and we've had a lot of requests to bring them back.
segments.translation: 我们已经预订了一个专门演奏20世纪30年代音乐的乐队，他们以前也有来过。我们收到很多村民的请求，希望他们能再来。

segments.text: FRANK: I'm not really a dancer, but I'd like to do something to help.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：我不擅长跳舞，但我想做点什么来帮忙。

segments.text: JANE: Well, we sell tickets in advance, and having an extra person to check them at the door, as people arrive, would be good - it can be quite a bottleneck if everyone arrives at once!
segments.translation: 简：嗯，我们提前售票，当人们到达时，最好还有一人在门口查票。如果每个人都同时到达，这可能是一个相当大的难题！

segments.text: FRANK: OK, I'm happy with that.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：好的，我很高兴能帮上忙。

segments.text: JANE: We're also arranging a New Year's Eve party.
segments.translation: 简：我们还安排了一个新年晚会。

segments.text: We're expecting that to be a really big event, so instead of the village hall, it'll be held in the Mountfort Hotel.
segments.translation: 我们预计这将是一个非常大的活动，所以它将在蒙特福特酒店举行，而不是在村大厅举行。

segments.text: FRANK: The …?
segments.translation: 弗兰克：什么酒店？

segments.text: JANE: Mountfort. M-O-U-N-T-F-O-R-T Hotel.
segments.translation: 简：蒙福特。拼写是M-O-U-N-T-F-O-R-T。

segments.text: It isn't in Southoe itself, but it's only a couple of miles away.
segments.translation: 它不在索索，但只有几英里远。

segments.text: The hotel will be providing dinner and we've booked a band.
segments.translation: 酒店将提供晚餐，我们已经预订了乐队。

segments.text: The one thing we haven't got yet is a poster.
segments.translation: 唯独缺了一张海报。

segments.text: That isn't something you could do, by any chance, is it?
segments.translation: 这不是您能做的吧，您会吗？

segments.text: FRANK: Well actually, yes. Before I retired I was a graphic designer, so that's right up my street.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：事实上，我能。退休前我是一名平面设计师，所以这就是我的职业。

segments.text: JANE: Oh perfect! I'll give you the details, and then perhaps you could send me a draft …
segments.translation: 简：哦，太好了！我会告诉你细节，然后也许你可以寄给我一份草稿……

segments.text: FRANK: Of course.
segments.translation: 弗兰克：当然。
